title: 5 things every AI agent harness needs
summary: Muhammad Farooq outlines five critical components needed in an AI agent harness beyond the model itself. The harness bridges the gap between model predictions and deployable tasks, separating prototype demos from production systems.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video outlines five components an AI agent harness needs beyond the model itself. Muhammad Farooq frames the harness infrastructure as what converts predictions into executable tasks, which is the distinction between production agents and demonstrations. The takeaway is that reliable agents depend on the surrounding harness rather than the model alone.
